# Extended version of Table 4.
# Column Descriptions
# 1. R.A. - Right ascension (J2000, deg)
# 2. Dec - Declination (J2000, deg)
# 3. pmra - Proper motion in R. A. (mas/yr)
# 4. pmra_e - Error in pmra (mas/yr)
# 5. pmdec - Proper motion in Dec (mas/yr)
# 6. pmdec_e - Error in pmdec (mas/yr)
# 7. V_R - Measured Radial Velocity (km/s)
# 8. V_R_e - Error in V_R (km/s)
# 9. g - g-band magnitude from PanSTARRS-1 (mag)
# 10. g-i - colour g - i from PanSTARRS-1 (mag)
# 11. Source - Source of detection. Ib17 - Ibata et al. 2017, O09 - Odenkirchen et al. 2009, Is16 - Ishigaki et al. 2019, K22 - this paper.
# R.A.    Dec    pmra   pmra_e pmdec  pmdec_e V_R    V_R_e g     g-i  Source
